entry.title: New: RES25-323 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF GIFT BOXES AND TICKETS TO THE HAWAII BOWL, VALUED AT $1,112, TO THE CITY FROM SERVPRO OF KAILUA FOR ITS “HONOR A FIRST RESPONDER AWARD” TO BE PRESENTED TO SELECTED INDIVIDUALS FROM THE CITY’S DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF OCEAN SAFETY, THE HONOLULU FIRE DEPARTMENT AND THE HONOLULU POLICE DEPARTMENT.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
